Insight: Many dads believe the 'dad bod' is inevitable once kids arrive, accepting belly fat as the price of fatherhood.
Insight Type: Dad Bod / Beer Belly Belief Shift
Notes: BELIEF: Having kids means gaining a belly - it's just what happens to dads. REFRAME: The dad bod isn't biology, it's lost habits. 3 minutes a day rebuilds the foundation before the belly arrived. 3-MIN MICRO-COMMITMENT: 3 minutes while kids nap or before they wake - fits any chaotic dad schedule. PURE PLANK BRIDGE: The board's timer gives you a win even on your worst dad-tired days.

Insight: Many men over 40 believe their metabolism has 'quit' and planks can't touch the beer belly they've built over decades.
Insight Type: Dad Bod / Beer Belly Belief Shift
Notes: BELIEF: After 40, metabolism dies and belly fat is permanent. REFRAME: Metabolism slows ~2% per decade, not 50%. The real loss was muscle - which planks rebuild. 3-MIN MICRO-COMMITMENT: 3 minutes daily starts reversing the muscle loss that slowed your metabolism. PURE PLANK BRIDGE: Pure Plank founders Adam and Jay came back at 51 - the board was part of their reset.

Insight: Many busy dads believe 'real' exercise requires an hour at the gym, making 3-minute planks seem pointless for their belly.
Insight Type: Dad Bod / Beer Belly Belief Shift
Notes: BELIEF: If I can't get to the gym for an hour, why bother with anything? REFRAME: The workout you do beats the workout you skip. 3 minutes done daily outperforms 60 minutes done monthly. 3-MIN MICRO-COMMITMENT: 3 minutes before the kids wake or during their screen time - no commute, no gym bag. PURE PLANK BRIDGE: Built-in timer proves daily consistency beats weekly intensity.

Insight: Many new dads abandon exercise entirely because newborn chaos leaves zero gym time, not realizing micro-workouts exist.
Notes: BELIEF: With a newborn, exercise is impossible until they're older. REFRAME: Newborn windows exist - nap time, bottle time, even 3am wakings. 3 minutes fits chaos. 3-MIN MICRO-COMMITMENT: 3 minutes during one nap per day keeps the habit alive until life stabilizes. PURE PLANK BRIDGE: No setup, no travel - the board is always ready when a window opens.

Insight: Many working dads prioritize kids' activities over their own health, watching their belly grow while driving to soccer practice.
Notes: BELIEF: Good dads sacrifice their fitness for their kids' activities. REFRAME: Your health IS an investment in your kids - they need you around for decades. 3 minutes doesn't compete with any activity. 3-MIN MICRO-COMMITMENT: 3 minutes at home before practice or after bedtime routine. PURE PLANK BRIDGE: Phone holder lets you track your kid's practice video while planking.

Insight: Many men believe they'll 'get serious' about belly fat once work calms down, but the busy season never actually ends.
Notes: BELIEF: I'll focus on fitness when work/life calms down. REFRAME: There's no calm season - only the habit you build now or never. 3 minutes can't be postponed out of existence. 3-MIN MICRO-COMMITMENT: 3 minutes during your morning coffee - already part of your routine. PURE PLANK BRIDGE: The board waits where you put it, zero startup friction when the window appears.

Insight: Many men quit planking within 15 seconds because elbow pain on hard floors feels like joint damage, not a solvable problem.
Notes: BELIEF: My elbows can't handle planking - it hurts too much to continue. REFRAME: That's pressure pain from hard floors, not joint damage. Cushioning fixes it completely. 3-MIN MICRO-COMMITMENT: 3 minutes is achievable when elbow pain isn't forcing you to stop at 15 seconds. PURE PLANK BRIDGE: Cushioned board eliminates the pain that ended your previous plank attempts.

Insight: Many men with previous injuries believe planking will aggravate old back/shoulder problems, avoiding core work entirely.
Notes: BELIEF: With my back/shoulder history, planking is too risky. REFRAME: Planks done right actually PROTECT injured backs - they're rehab, not risk. 3-MIN MICRO-COMMITMENT: 3 minutes with proper form strengthens the core that prevents future injury. PURE PLANK BRIDGE: Ergonomic handles keep wrists neutral - the same way PT clinics position you.

Insight: Many men target planks specifically to 'burn off' their beer belly, expecting the fat to melt from their midsection first.
Insight Type: Spot Reduction Myth / Targeting Belly Fat
Notes: BELIEF: If I plank hard enough, my beer belly will shrink directly. REFRAME: Planks build the abs underneath while diet handles the fat on top - they're partners, not substitutes. 3-MIN MICRO-COMMITMENT: 3 minutes daily builds what diet will eventually reveal. PURE PLANK BRIDGE: Timer tracks the strength gains even when the mirror hasn't caught up yet.

Insight: Many men dismiss core work because 'abs are made in the kitchen,' then diet down to skinny-fat with no muscle to show.
Notes: BELIEF: Diet is everything - core work is a waste of time for belly fat. REFRAME: Diet reveals, planks build. Without core work, you'll be thin but still soft. 3-MIN MICRO-COMMITMENT: 3 minutes doesn't compete with your diet focus - it complements it. PURE PLANK BRIDGE: So short it never feels like 'taking time away' from nutrition planning.

Insight: Many men believe planks are 'too easy' to build real core strength, dismissing them for heavy compound lifts that ignore direct core work.
Notes: BELIEF: Real men lift - planks are for yoga class, not building strength. REFRAME: Every heavy lift depends on core bracing. Weak core = weak lifts. Planks are the foundation, not the soft option. 3-MIN MICRO-COMMITMENT: 3 minutes of direct core work makes every heavy lift safer and stronger. PURE PLANK BRIDGE: The board adds challenge and progression beyond basic floor planks.

Insight: Many men over 40 tried planking years ago, quit from pain or boredom, and assume nothing has changed since.
Notes: BELIEF: I tried planking before and it didn't work - why would now be different? REFRAME: Past failure was likely pain or progression stall, not the exercise. Different setup = different outcome. 3-MIN MICRO-COMMITMENT: 3 minutes with comfort + progression breaks the old pattern. PURE PLANK BRIDGE: Cushioning solves the pain that stopped you; timer provides progression tracking.

Insight: Many men expect visible abs from planking within weeks, then quit when the timeline is actually months of consistency plus diet.
Notes: BELIEF: A month of planks should show visible abs. REFRAME: Core strength builds in days (hold time improves), but visible abs need months of deficit. Measure the right thing. 3-MIN MICRO-COMMITMENT: 3 minutes daily - track hold time, not the mirror. Strength precedes visibility. PURE PLANK BRIDGE: Built-in timer makes strength progress undeniable even before fat loss shows.

Insight: Many dads want to 'get back in shape' for their kids but set unrealistic deadlines that lead to crash diets and burnout.
Notes: BELIEF: I need to transform quickly to be the active dad my kids deserve. REFRAME: Your kids need you consistent, not crashed. The habit that survives beats the sprint that burns out. 3-MIN MICRO-COMMITMENT: 3 minutes is small enough to survive the motivation dip that kills transformation programs. PURE PLANK BRIDGE: Sustainable daily habit that your kids can actually watch and learn from.

Insight: Many men plateau at 60-second planks and assume that's the ceiling, not knowing progression options exist.
Notes: BELIEF: Once I can hold 60 seconds, planks stop working - what's the point? REFRAME: 60 seconds is beginner plateau, not the ceiling. Variations, weighted holds, and instability add infinite progression. 3-MIN MICRO-COMMITMENT: 3 minutes allows cycling through progressions in a single session. PURE PLANK BRIDGE: The board's design enables variations that a flat floor can't offer.

Insight: Many overweight men believe they're 'too heavy' to plank, assuming the exercise is only for already-fit people.
Notes: BELIEF: At my weight, I can't even get into a plank position - it's not for me yet. REFRAME: Incline planks and knee variations exist exactly for starting heavy. Everyone modifies, including pros. 3-MIN MICRO-COMMITMENT: 3 minutes of modified planks builds toward full planks faster than waiting to lose weight first. PURE PLANK BRIDGE: Cushioned surface + handles reduce wrist strain that's worse at higher bodyweight.
